changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani killed — second senior death
latest_news.text: Iranian state media confirms Basij paramilitary force commander Gholamreza Soleimani killed in Israeli overnight strike. Second senior security figure confirmed dead alongside Larijani.

latest_news.headline: US Embassy Baghdad targeted by drone attack — explosion heard
latest_news.text: US Embassy in Baghdad targeted by drone attack, explosion heard. Latest in series of attacks on US diplomatic facility. Separately, US State Dept orders all embassies worldwide to conduct immediate security reviews over spillover risk.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US 'not ready to leave yet' but will leave Iran 'in the near future'
latest_news.text: Trump tells Sky News US is 'not really afraid of anything' and 'not ready to leave yet' but will withdraw 'in the near future.' Also says US 'never did' need NATO help for Hormuz — reversing earlier coalition push.

latest_news.headline: US orders worldwide embassy security reviews — global spillover concern
latest_news.text: US State Department orders all embassies worldwide to 'immediately' conduct security reviews due to 'ongoing and developing situation' and 'potential for spill-over effects.' First worldwide alert of the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires missiles at Israeli forces near Lebanon border — dual-front strikes
latest_news.text: Iranian media reports Tehran launched wave of missiles at Israeli forces operating in and around Lebanon border. Dual-front engagement — Iran striking Israel while Israel simultaneously bombing Tehran and Lebanese Hezbollah.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches ground operations in Lebanon — UK and allies 'gravely concerned'
latest_news.text: Israel announces ground operations in southern Lebanon. UK and allies say they are 'gravely concerned.' IDF simultaneously hitting Tehran with fresh overnight strikes.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 02:04 UTC) — War Day 18 continues across 5 active theaters. Larijani + Basij commander confirmed killed — leadership decapitation accelerating. US Embassy Baghdad drone-struck; worldwide embassy security review ordered (first global spillover alert). Israel ground ops expanding in Lebanon. Iran missiles at Israeli forces near Lebanon border — dual-front engagement. Trump says US staying 'for now' but reverses NATO Hormuz push. Bushehr plant struck (no damage). 1,444+ killed in Iran, 18,551 wounded. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. Oil >$100. No ceasefire signals in any theater.
